raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":0.7,"RX.4":0.3,"RX.5":0.3},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"rationale":{"R1.2":"The vague delegation to 'check' the research artifact implies verifying the logical consistency of the approach description and argument flow.","R1.3":"Checking the artifact involves ensuring that the reported results align with the claims of outperformance over baselines.","R1.5":"The repetitive structure in the artifact suggests that structural reorganization at the section level is a central expectation for the check.","R1.6":"The obvious repetitions and phrasing issues make writing polish a load-bearing responsibility in reviewing this draft section.","RX.1":"A general check of the research text expects assessment of whether uncertainties in the results or method are properly disclosed.","RX.2":"Reviewing the artifact includes checking for overclaims in the performance comparisons and conclusions drawn.","RX.3":"The delegation implies confirming that the described approach adheres to the stated scope of clarification question ranking in machine translation.","RX.4":"Although peripheral, checking for potential downstream harms from the interactive translation system is relevant in a broad review.","RX.5":"The check peripherally involves verifying the provenance of the training corpus and evaluation data mentioned."}}

rationale.R1.2: The vague delegation to 'check' the research artifact implies verifying the logical consistency of the approach description and argument flow.
rationale.R1.3: Checking the artifact involves ensuring that the reported results align with the claims of outperformance over baselines.
rationale.R1.5: The repetitive structure in the artifact suggests that structural reorganization at the section level is a central expectation for the check.
rationale.R1.6: The obvious repetitions and phrasing issues make writing polish a load-bearing responsibility in reviewing this draft section.
rationale.RX.1: A general check of the research text expects assessment of whether uncertainties in the results or method are properly disclosed.
rationale.RX.2: Reviewing the artifact includes checking for overclaims in the performance comparisons and conclusions drawn.
rationale.RX.3: The delegation implies confirming that the described approach adheres to the stated scope of clarification question ranking in machine translation.
rationale.RX.4: Although peripheral, checking for potential downstream harms from the interactive translation system is relevant in a broad review.
rationale.RX.5: The check peripherally involves verifying the provenance of the training corpus and evaluation data mentioned.
